title: Aftermath
description: Explore desolate cities, abandoned underground tunnels and railroads, and overgrown skyscrapers. Pick up your gun and take back the world!
body:
Experience the aftermath of a minecraft catastrophe. Underground railroads abandoned, skyscrapers full of monsters, large craters where people once stood, and you. Pick up your gun, and go reclaim the lost world. Be wary of hostile villagers, for they no longer put up with your theft. And also, watch out for your own kind. They caused this.
  This modpack was made for factions among the ruins, people fighting for what remains. You can recreate this experience or live it yourself. Credits to The Lost Cities, the main mod in this pack. To make your cities, you must go through the world options, for they do not spawn naturally. Also credits to TaCZ, otherwise known as Timeless and Classics Zero. They are the best gun mod for miles. Oh, and don't forget Immersive Aircraft and Farmer's Delight, all that said, those are the main mods. I'm sure you can discover the other ones.
